---
title: "Commercial: Si señor"
mainfont: Courier Prime
---

1990 McCool FM - :30 second spot

---

__SEÑOR:__ 
Is Si señor coming to a town near you? 
Si señor! 
Come to our world renowned bar where we always answer with, Si señor! 

__SEÑOR:__ 
Are you tired of people saying no? 
No señor, you can’t start a pub. 
No, señor, you can’t drink 1 litre of tequila. 
No señor, you are too drunk to drive. 

__SEÑOR:__ 
At Si señor we change those to: 
Si señor, congratulations on your successful bars. 
Si señor, here’s your first shot. 
y Si señor, we’ll get you a cab home.

__SEÑOR:__ 
Whether you want beer, cider, wine, or tequila. 
Nachos, tacos, or churros. 
At Si señor we’re ready with a smile and a… now say it with me… 
Si señor!
